channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Obamacare Premiums Set for Another Double-Digit Increase as 2027 Costs Rise
item.description:
Affordable Care Act marketplace insurers are seeking another year of double-digit premium increases in 2027, driven by rising healthcare costs, subsidy changes, and declining enrollment.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/finance/obamacare-aca-health-insurance-premium-increase-2027
